note: A table is a GraphicFrame wrapping a Drawing.Table. Data can be seeded inline via 'data' (semicolon-separated rows, comma-separated cells) or per-cell via 'r{R}c{C}' props. Dimensions in EMU-parseable length (1in/2cm/raw EMU/720pt). Read depth: `get /slide[N]/table[K]` (default --depth=1) returns the table node plus row stubs; cell content is not included. Pass `--depth 2` to materialize cells, or address them directly via `get /slide[N]/table[K]/row[R]/cell[C]`. The default stays at 1 because large tables (e.g. 50x10) at depth=2 dominate the response body.

id.description: OOXML graphic frame id (cNvPr id). pptx-only readback.

rowHeight.description: uniform row height (EMU). If unspecified, derived from 'height' / rows.

headerFill.description: solid fill color applied to row 0 (header).
headerFill.readback: per-cell fill, not aggregated at table level

bodyFill.description: solid fill color applied to rows 1..N (body).
bodyFill.readback: per-cell fill, not aggregated at table level

bandedRows.description: tblPr @bandRow flag — alternating row banding from the table style.

bandedCols.description: tblPr @bandCol flag — alternating column banding from the table style.

border.all.description: shorthand: applies the border to every edge of every cell. PPT OOXML has no table-level border element — this fans out to per-cell a:lnL/lnR/lnT/lnB. Format: 'WIDTH[ DASH][ COLOR]' space-separated (e.g. '1pt solid FF0000') or 'STYLE;WIDTH;COLOR[;DASH]' semicolon form (style is ignored — kept for docx parity). DASH ∈ solid|dot|dash|lgDash|dashDot|sysDot|sysDash. Use 'none' to clear. Alias: border. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.bottom.description: outer bottom border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR'. Add/Set only — read per-cell.

border.horizontal.description: inside-horizontal dividers (between rows). Fans out to bottom of rows 1..N-1 plus top of rows 2..N. PPT has no native inside-border element. Alias: border.insideH. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.
border.horizontal.readback: n/a (PPT has no native inside-border emit on Get)

border.left.description: outer left edge: applies to the left of column-1 cells in every row only. Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.right.description: outer right edge: applies to the right of last-column cells in every row only. Format same as border.all. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.

border.top.description: outer top border. Format: STYLE[;SIZE[;COLOR[;SPACE]]]. Cross-format note: pptx accepts a space-separated 'WIDTH DASH COLOR' form; docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' (SIZE is in 1/8 pt units). Add/Set only — table-level border readback is not surfaced today; inspect per-cell border.top instead.

border.vertical.description: inside-vertical dividers (between columns). Fans out to right of cols 1..M-1 plus left of cols 2..M. Alias: border.insideV. Cross-format note: docx only accepts the semicolon form 'STYLE;SIZE;COLOR' — pptx is more lenient.
border.vertical.readback: n/a (PPT has no native inside-border emit on Get)
